metadata.title: PazarSync — E-commerce Profitability & Operations
metadata.description: Platform for Turkish marketplace sellers: per-order real profitability, automated settlement reconciliation, and expense management.

orgStoreSwitcher.emptyTitle: You don't belong to an organization yet
orgStoreSwitcher.emptyDescription: Create an organization or join via invitation to start using PazarSync.

toast.storeFlowNotReady: Connect-store flow is not ready yet

hero.subtitle: Connect your Trendyol and Hepsiburada stores. See every order's net profit in seconds — commissions, shipping, platform fees, and VAT broken out cleanly.

profit.title: Real per-order profit
profit.description: Commission, shipping, platform fees, and VAT itemized so you know what each order actually earned in seconds.

reconciliation.title: Automated reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Match payout reports, carrier invoices, and order data to answer the one question that matters: did the marketplace pay correctly?

expenses.title: Expense management
expenses.description: Product costs, ads, packaging — add every operational expense so your profit figure is honest, not optimistic.

returnsPage.intent: Track your store's return claims and their profit impact in one place

noStore.title: No store selected
noStore.description: Connect or select a store to see its returns.

noReturns.title: No returns yet
noReturns.description: Return claims sync from Trendyol every 6 hours; the first one will show up here.

ordersPage.title: Orders
ordersPage.intent: Orders flowing from connected stores. Filter, watch reconciliation state, open the detail for the profit breakdown.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by order or package number

onTime.label: Fast · on time
onTime.hint: Shipped on time; the fast-delivery advantage (reduced service fee) was kept.

late.label: Fast · late
late.hint: Shipped late; the fast-delivery advantage was lost.

pending.label: Fast delivery
pending.hint: A fast-delivery order; the delivery outcome isn't known yet.

noStore.title: No store connected yet
noStore.description: Connect a store to start seeing orders.

noOrders.title: No orders yet
noOrders.description: Once the first order syncs from the connected store, it will land here.

excludedList.label: Outside profit
excludedList.empty: No orders are excluded from profit
excludedList.intro: These orders count toward your revenue but not your profit. You can see the reason for each one below.

COST_DEADLINE_MISSED.label: Cost not entered
COST_DEADLINE_MISSED.detail: The cost wasn't entered by the end of the day, so this order isn't included in profit.

LATE_UNCOSTED_ARRIVAL.label: Late order
LATE_UNCOSTED_ARRIVAL.detail: The order arrived late without a cost, so it isn't included in profit.

LEGACY_BACKFILL.label: Old order
LEGACY_BACKFILL.detail: This is an old order with no cost, so it isn't included in profit.

storePicker.label: Store
storePicker.connectFirst: Connect a store first to edit these settings.

profile.title: Profile
profile.intent: Your account details and how we show you.

identity.title: Profile information
identity.description: Your name and contact details. Your email is used to sign in.

avatar.hint: JPG or PNG, up to 2 MB.

fields.emailHint: Email is changed through a separate verification flow.

region.title: Region & language
region.description: Controls how dates, times and currency are shown.

summary.title: Account summary
summary.tipBody: Adding a name and photo helps your teammates recognize you.

members.title: Members

storeAccessDialog.title: Store access
storeAccessDialog.noStores: This organization has no stores yet.

errors.CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_OWNER: You can't demote the last owner. Promote another member to owner first.

noPermission.title: You can't view this page
noPermission.description: Only an organization owner or admin can see the member list.

error.title: Couldn't load members
error.description: Something went wrong. Please try again.

members.intent: Manage team members, their roles and store access.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.intent: Manage which notifications you want to receive.

email.title: Email notifications
email.description: Configure the email notifications sent to keep you informed.
email.masterDescription: Turn all email notifications on or off with a single switch.
email.dailySummaryDescription: Receive an email at the end of the day summarising your store's performance.
email.weeklyReportDescription: A detailed report showing your overall status is sent at the start of each week.

alerts.title: Alert notifications
alerts.description: Get notified when situations requiring attention arise in your store.
alerts.lossDescription: Get an alert when a product is sold below its cost price.
alerts.marginDescription: Receive a notification when the profit margin falls below your set threshold.
alerts.priceChangeDescription: Be notified when your product's price changes.
alerts.returnDescription: Receive a notification when a new return request is created.
alerts.stockDescription: Get an alert when stock levels drop to a critical point.

system.title: System notifications
system.description: These notifications are always on and cannot be disabled.
system.body: Account security sign-in alerts, subscription and payment status updates, and important platform-wide announcements are always sent. These notifications are required for the service to operate correctly and cannot be turned off individually.

summary.howBody: PazarSync delivers your notifications via email. Alert thresholds and report periods will be configurable directly from here in the future.
summary.tipBody: Enable alert notifications to take action early against loss-making sales and stock shortages.

commission.title: Commission
commission.intent: View category-based commission rates and manage the seller level for your active store

sellerLevel.title: Seller Level
sellerLevel.description: Your seller level directly affects the commission rates applied. Higher levels may qualify for more favorable rates.
sellerLevel.label: Current level

categoryRates.title: Category Commission Rates
categoryRates.description: The rates below are reference values set by the marketplace. Actual rates may vary based on your seller level and campaign conditions.

summary.title: About commissions
summary.infoBody: Commission rates are set by the marketplace and vary by seller level. The values on this page are for reference only.
summary.tipBody: To see your actual commission rates, check your seller level and rate details in your marketplace seller panel. When settlement reconciliation runs, the system reflects real rates automatically.

organization.title: General
organization.intent: Your organization's name, identity, and financial settings.

info.title: Organization details
info.description: Your organization's display name and short identifier. These represent your identity on the platform.

logo.hint: PNG or JPG, up to 2 MB.

fields.name: Organization name
fields.slugHint: The short name cannot be changed.

accounting.title: Accounting settings
accounting.description: Configure which tax and deduction items are factored into profit calculations.

negativeVat.title: Include negative VAT
negativeVat.description: Negative VAT amounts from returns and cancellations are included in profit calculations.

stopaj.title: Include withholding tax (stopaj)
stopaj.description: Withholding tax applied on settlement payouts is reflected in net profit calculations.

summary.title: Organization summary
summary.tipBody: Organization details and accounting preferences apply to all your stores. Changes saved here are immediately reflected in profit calculations.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.intent: Configure display and formatting settings specific to your account.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose the visual theme for the application. Your preference is stored in this browser only.
appearance.themeDescription: Use a light, dark, or your operating system's default theme.

formats.title: Formats
formats.description: Customise how currency, numbers, and dates are displayed.
formats.currencyDescription: Choose the currency symbol shown next to amounts.
formats.numberDescription: Choose the thousands separator and decimal notation.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Use keyboard shortcuts to navigate the app quickly.
shortcuts.note: Keyboard shortcut support is coming soon. Once enabled, you will be able to use quick-access keys for navigation, search, and common actions.

summary.scopeTitle: When do these settings take effect?
summary.scopeBody: Appearance and formatting preferences belong to your account only — they do not affect other members or your organisation. The theme preference is stored per browser.
summary.tipBody: Theme changes apply instantly — no need to save. Format settings take effect across all screens once saved.

security.title: Security
security.intent: Manage your password, two-factor authentication, and active sessions.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Change your password regularly to improve account security.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account to protect against unauthorized access.

sms.title: SMS verification
sms.description: A one-time verification code is sent to your phone number when signing in.

authenticator.title: Authenticator app
authenticator.description: Generate time-based codes via Google Authenticator or a similar app.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: View and manage active sessions connected to your account.
sessions.cannotTerminate: You cannot terminate the current session.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: These actions are irreversible. Read carefully before proceeding.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.headerDescription: Your account and all personal data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. Your account, store connections, and all financial data will be permanently deleted.

summary.title: Security status
summary.tipBody: Enable two-factor authentication to add an extra layer of security. We recommend changing your password at least every 3 months.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.intent: Manage your subscription plan and billing details here.

plan.title: Current plan
plan.description: Details of your active subscription plan and current usage.
plan.autoRenewDescription: Your subscription will renew automatically at the end of the period.

billing.title: Billing details
billing.description: Enter the person or company details to be used on your invoices.

history.title: Invoice history
history.description: View and download your past invoices.
history.emptyDescription: Invoices issued after your subscription becomes active will appear here.

summary.tipBody: When you need more stores or higher order volume, you can upgrade your plan to instantly expand your capacity.

payment.title: Payment method
payment.description: The card linked to your subscription.

connections.title: Connections
connections.intent: Connect, monitor and manage your marketplace stores.

disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect this store?
disconnectConfirm.body: {name} will be disconnected. Its orders, products and settlements are permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

supported.title: Supported marketplaces
supported.body: PazarSync currently works with Trendyol and Hepsiburada. More integrations are on the way.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.intent: Set the shipping tariff source and carrier for the selected store.
shipping.infoBody: With the Trendyol contract, shipping cost is derived from the desi tariff of the carrier you pick. With your own contract, you enter your own tariff table.

profitSettings.title: Profit Formula
profitSettings.intent: Set how withholding tax and negative net VAT are handled in the selected store's profit calculation.
profitSettings.infoBody: Stopaj is the 1% e-commerce withholding tax deducted from sales. Net VAT is the VAT you collected minus the deductible VAT charged to you; when this is negative you have a VAT receivable. We recommend deciding whether to include these two items in your profit with your accountant.
profitSettings.cardDescription: These options only affect orders created from now on.
profitSettings.forwardOnlyBody: Changing these settings does not recompute past orders; each order keeps the value computed with the settings in force when it was created. The change applies only to orders that arrive afterwards.

stopaj.title: Include withholding tax (stopaj) in profit
stopaj.description: When on, the 1% e-commerce withholding tax is subtracted from net profit. Turn it off to exclude stopaj from the calculation.

negativeNetVat.title: Include negative net VAT in profit
negativeNetVat.description: When net VAT is negative (a VAT receivable), it is added to profit. When off (recommended), negative net VAT is not counted; positive net VAT is always subtracted.

marginColoring.title: Profit Margin Coloring
marginColoring.description: Color profit and margin values from red to green based on thresholds you define.
marginColoring.enableDescription: When on, profit and margin values are colored by the ranges you set below. When off, profits show green and losses red.
marginColoring.bucketsDescription: Each color covers margins from its threshold up to the next. The lowest color covers everything below it; the highest, everything above.
marginColoring.previewDescription: How sample margin values look with your current settings.
marginColoring.savedToast: Your coloring preference has been saved.
marginColoring.errorAscending: Thresholds must be in ascending order and distinct.

empty.title: Notification center coming soon
empty.description: Sync events, new order notifications, and alert history will appear here.

MARKETPLACE_AUTH_FAILED.title: Authentication failed
MARKETPLACE_AUTH_FAILED.description: The marketplace rejected your API credentials. Check the keys in your store settings.

MARKETPLACE_ACCESS_DENIED.title: Access denied
MARKETPLACE_ACCESS_DENIED.description: The marketplace blocked your connection. If you're on sandbox, verify IP allowlisting.

MARKETPLACE_UNREACHABLE.title: Marketplace unreachable
MARKETPLACE_UNREACHABLE.description: The marketplace servers are temporarily not responding.

SYNC_IN_PROGRESS.title: Sync already running
SYNC_IN_PROGRESS.description: A sync of this type is already in progress. Wait for it to finish.

RATE_LIMITED.title: Rate limit exceeded
RATE_LIMITED.description: The marketplace received too many requests in a short window. We'll retry shortly.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Invalid data
VALIDATION_ERROR.description: The data being synced doesn't match the marketplace's expected shape.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Unexpected error
INTERNAL_ERROR.description: Something went wrong. If the issue persists, please contact support.

fallback.title: Unknown error
fallback.description: Something went wrong. If the issue persists, please contact support.

justSynced.orders: All your orders are up to date
justSynced.returns: All your returns are up to date
justSynced.products: All your products are up to date
justSynced.profitability: Your data is up to date
justSynced.dashboard: Your data is up to date

schedule.orders: Orders arrive instantly via webhook · hourly scan as backup
schedule.products: Stock/price at 15 past each hour · full scan every night
schedule.dashboard: Flows sync themselves on scheduled intervals

staleBanner.message: This data hasn't been updated in {hours} hours

page.title: Products
page.description: Approved products and variants from your store
page.intent: Approved products synced from your Trendyol store

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name, model code, stock code, barcode…

noStore.title: Connect a store first
noStore.description: Connect your Trendyol store to see products.

noProducts.title: No products synced yet
noProducts.description: Run the first sync to get started.

empty.missingCostNone: All products have a cost set.
empty.missingVatNone: All products have a VAT rate set.

missingCostBanner.title: {count} products missing cost — profit cannot be calculated.

desiCell.overrideAria: You set this dimensional weight manually.

errors.INVALID_DIMENSIONAL_WEIGHT_TOO_SMALL: Desi must be greater than zero.

replaceConfirm.title: Replace costs
replaceConfirm.description: This will remove all existing cost profiles from {count} variants and attach only the selected profile. This cannot be undone.

bulkDesi.title: Set dimensional weight
bulkDesi.description: Apply one desi value to all {count} selected variants.
bulkDesi.help: This value overwrites the Trendyol value and is preserved across future syncs.

errors.INVALID_DIMENSIONAL_WEIGHT_TOO_SMALL: Desi must be greater than zero.

page.title: Costs
page.description: Reusable cost profiles attached to product variants.

empty.title: No cost profiles yet
empty.description: Create cost profiles to attach to product variants. Each profile represents a cost type (raw materials, packaging, etc.).

noStore.title: Select a store first
noStore.description: Cost profiles are store-specific. Select a connected store to create and manage them.

fields.name: Cost name
fields.amountGrossHelp: Enter the VAT-included amount from your supplier invoice.

validation.nameTooLong: Cost name must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.manualFxRateRequired: A rate is required in MANUAL mode.
validation.tryMustUseAuto: TRY currency always uses Auto mode.

createDialog.title: New cost profile
createDialog.description: Create a reusable cost profile you can attach to product variants.

archive.confirmDescription: This cost profile will be archived and can no longer be attached to new variants. Past orders are unaffected. You can restore it at any time.

page.title: Commission Rates
page.intent: Current commission tariff for your Trendyol store

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search category, parent category, or brand…

columns.productCountHint: Number of synced, approved products you have in this category.

commissionRates.autoSwitchedToActive: Switched to 'Only what I sell' — sorted by product count.

noStore.title: No active store
noStore.description: Connect a store to view its commission tariff.

noRates.title: Commission tariff not loaded yet
noRates.description: Rates for this marketplace are not yet imported. The tariff will be available soon.

noMatches.title: No rates match the current filter
noMatches.description: The search or 'Only what I sell' filter narrowed the results. Clear filters to view the full tariff.

page.title: Product Pricing
page.intent: Review estimated per-product profitability and plan your pricing

reason.noCost: This product has no cost; enter a cost first.
reason.notCalculable: Shipping/commission info is missing, price cannot be calculated.
reason.notPriceSensitive: A price change does not move profit to this target.

save.confirmBody: This product's sale price will be updated from {current} to {new}.
save.warning: This action is live: the new price is published directly on the Trendyol storefront. You can change it again if it's wrong.
save.pendingToast: Awaiting Trendyol approval — the change has been queued.

noStore.title: No active store
noStore.description: Connect a store to view product profitability.

noProducts.title: No approved products yet
noProducts.description: No approved products to price were found for this store. They will appear here as products sync.

noMatches.title: No products match
noMatches.description: The search or sort narrowed the results. Reset to view all products.

settings.title: Shipping Tariff
settings.subtitle: Choose the shipping tariff used to estimate your net profit.
settings.carrierHelp: This carrier must be approved on your Trendyol contract.

ownContract.title: Upload Your Tariff
ownContract.description: You'll soon be able to upload your own shipping tariff via Excel.

tariffTable.title: Current Tariff
tariffTable.subtitle: Your carrier's current desi-based prices and Barem support tiers. Prices exclude VAT.

errors.SHIPPING_CARRIER_REQUIRED_FOR_TRENDYOL_C: A carrier is required when Trendyol Contract is selected.
errors.SHIPPING_CARRIER_PLATFORM_MISMATCH: The selected carrier does not match this store's marketplace.

NO_DESI.title: Desi value missing
NO_DESI.reason: Shipping estimate needs the product's desi / dimensional weight.

NO_CARRIER.title: No default carrier
NO_CARRIER.reason: Your store doesn't have a default shipping carrier configured.

OWN_CONTRACT_EMPTY.title: Awaiting tariff
OWN_CONTRACT_EMPTY.reason: Own contract is selected, but your shipping tariff hasn't been uploaded yet.

DESI_OVERFLOW.title: High desi, out of tariff
DESI_OVERFLOW.reason: This product exceeds the highest desi covered by the selected carrier's tariff.

profitBreakdown.title: Profit breakdown
profitBreakdown.unavailable: Profit not calculated for this order.
profitBreakdown.notCalculable: Profit can't be calculated for this product.

profitBadge.tooltip: Click to open the profit breakdown

orderDetail.intent: Order from {date} — profit breakdown, fee timeline, and return status.

estimatedNetProfit.label: Estimated profit
estimatedNetProfit.hint: Computed deterministically at T+0 from PSF, stoppage, and shipping estimates.

settledNetProfit.label: Settled profit
settledNetProfit.hint: Updated as settlement rows land from Trendyol and reconciliation completes.
settledNetProfit.partial: Partial settlement processed; settled profit finalizes at full reconciliation.

margin.label: Profit margin
margin.basisSettled: Share of sale (incl. VAT, based on settled profit).
margin.basisEstimated: Share of sale (incl. VAT, based on estimated profit).

descriptions.NOT_SETTLED: Estimated profit was written at T+0. The state will update when the first settlement row arrives.
descriptions.PARTIALLY_SETTLED: Some settlement rows have been processed. Settled profit will be finalized when the PaymentOrder confirms.
descriptions.FULLY_SETTLED: PaymentOrder has confirmed. Settled profit is final.
descriptions.FULLY_SETTLED_WITH_DATE: PaymentOrder confirmed on {date}. Settled profit is final.

empty.title: No fee rows yet
empty.description: PSF, stoppage, and shipping estimates will appear here once the order is created.

empty.title: No order items
empty.description: The sync has not pulled line items yet.

empty.title: No return claims on this order
empty.description: Return claims will appear here once they start flowing from Trendyol.

errors.noStoreContext: An active store is required to view order detail.
errors.notFound: Order not found or does not belong to this store.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the order. Please try again.

exclusion.title: Outside profit calculations
exclusion.description: This order isn't included in profit. It still appears in revenue but not in profit reports.

returnBanner.title: This order has a return
returnBanner.description: {count, plural, one {# return claim} other {# return claims}} processed; the amounts in the profit breakdown are shown net of returns.

livePerformance.title: Live Performance
livePerformance.subtitle: Today's real-time profit, revenue and order performance

noStore.title: No store selected
noStore.description: Connect or select a marketplace store to see live performance.

kpis.pendingHint: {count} order(s) awaiting cost — not in profit yet

todayProducts.title: Products Ordered Today
todayProducts.noResultsDescription: No product matches the search or filter.

buffer.pendingNotice: Add the cost before midnight or this order is permanently excluded from profit.
buffer.loadError: Could not load the order detail.

realtime.costMissingLine: Some items are missing a cost, profit can't be determined yet
realtime.catchupTitle: {count} new orders arrived while you were away
realtime.tabBadge: 🛍️ {count, plural, one {New order arrived!} other {# new orders arrived!}}
